track_attachments.new_copy: Enable this option to copy relative attachments to the new relative location when the location of a FoS file is changed.
track_attachments.overwrite: Enable this option to overwrite existing files when copying attachments during changes to a FoS file's location.
track_attachments.ignore: Enable this option to ignore errors when tracking attachments during a change to a FoS file's location. (e.g., attachment not found, already exists in new location)

maps.default: Name of the default map when using JSON mapping features.

diffraction.default_engine: Default diffraction engine to use when generating patterns from CIF files.
diffraction.x_label: X-Axis label when generating plots of theoretical diffraction patterns.

slider_digits.default: Default number of digits to display in interactive slider plots (may be overridden by individual parameters).
